query:
-- Adicionar colunas faltantes na tabela messages
ALTER TABLE `messages`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `aiGenerated` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `deliveryStatus` enum('pending','sent','delivered','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `deliveryError` text DEFAULT NULL;

-- Resetar status da conta WhatsApp para disconnected (sessão perdida)
UPDATE `accounts` SET `status` = 'disconnected', `waQrCode` = NULL WHERE `channel` = 'whatsapp' AND `id` = 2;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user rskERJxqepVxgiV.root --database fNE9efXdCmnppeWra27xJs --execute -- Adicionar colunas faltantes na tabela messages
ALTER TABLE `messages`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `aiGenerated` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `deliveryStatus` enum('pending','sent','delivered','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `deliveryError` text DEFAULT NULL;

-- Resetar status da conta WhatsApp para disconnected (sessão perdida)
UPDATE `accounts` SET `status` = 'disconnected', `waQrCode` = NULL WHERE `channel` = 'whatsapp' AND `id` = 2;
